admission.process:
REAP is conducted for admission to B.Tech programs based on JEE Main scores or 12th percentage (Science). Direct admission is also available for limited seats.
Call 099285 55222 to start admission at PIET, Jaipur
admission.eligibility:
To be eligible for REAP admission at PIET, candidates must be at least 17 years old and have passed 10+2 with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects, along with one optional subject (Chemistry/Biology/Computer Science/Biotechnology). A minimum of 45% marks is required (40% for reserved categories). A valid JEE Main score may be required as per institute guidelines.
📞 For admissions, call 099285 55222.
admission.direct admission:
Yes, direct admission is available on vacant seats left by students who withdraw. Eligible students can apply directly for those seats.
Call 099285 55222 to start admission at PIET, Jaipur
admission.counselling procedure:
REAP counselling includes registration, merit list, choice filling, seat allotment & reporting. Steps:
1. Create login ID
2. Fill provisional form
3. Upload documents
4. Verification by counsellor
5. Submit form
6. Pay token fee.
Call 099285 55222 to start admission at PIET, Jaipur.
admission.last year cut off:
There is no fixed cut-off. It varies each year based on student preferences, branch demand, and seat availability.
Call 099285 55222 to start admission at PIET, Jaipur
admission.important dates:
REAP 2025 applications are open. Last date to register: July 2, 2025. Fee payment deadline: June 30, 2025. Merit list release: July 4, 2025.
Call 099285 55222 to start admission at PIET, Jaipur
admission.documents required:
Required documents:
- 10th & 12th marksheets
- Class 10 certificate
- Domicile certificate
- Aadhaar card
- JEE Main 2024 scorecard
- Allotment letter
- Passport size photos
- Income, category, PWD, medical & ex-servicemen certificates (if applicable)
Call 099285 55222 to start admission at PIET, Jaipur
admission.how to apply:
Call 099285 55222 to start the admission process for Poornima Institute of Engineering and Technology, Jaipur.
Call 099285 55222 to start admission at PIET, Jaipur
admission.admission helpline:
Call 099285 55222 for any admission-related queries at Poornima Institute of Engineering and Technology, Jaipur.
Call 099285 55222 to start admission at PIET, Jaipur
admission.about:
PIET Jaipur offers a strong academic environment with experienced faculty, concept-driven teaching, and regular internal assessments. Students receive personalized support through remedial classes to help them excel. Classes are held Monday to Friday, and the college consistently maintains an excellent academic record.
📞 For admissions, call 099285 55222.

greet.about: Hello! 👋 I’m the official PIET Bot. Feel free to ask any query related to Poornima Institute of Engineering & Technology (PIET). For direct assistance, call us at 099285 55222.

overview.established_year: Poornima Institute of Engineering and Technology (PIET) was established in 2007 with a vision to deliver world-class technical education in Rajasthan.
overview.approvals_and_affiliation: PIET is approved by AICTE, affiliated to Rajasthan Technical University (RTU), Kota, and has been granted autonomous status, which allows it academic flexibility to design industry-relevant curricula and adopt innovative teaching methodologies.
overview.college_ranking: PIET is consistently ranked among the top private engineering colleges in Rajasthan, known for its academic excellence, student placements, and institutional achievements.
overview.why_choose_us: Choose PIET for its excellent placement record, state-of-the-art labs, modern campus, and experienced faculty. With autonomy, NAAC 'A' accreditation, and NBA-certified programs, PIET offers a future-focused learning ecosystem enriched with innovation, leadership, and industry collaboration.
overview.naac_accreditation: PIET is accredited by NAAC with an 'A' grade, affirming its commitment to high-quality education, governance, and continuous institutional improvement.
overview.nba_accreditation: PIET’s B.Tech programs are accredited by NBA, ensuring their alignment with national and global academic and industry standards.
overview.about_college:
Poornima Institute of Engineering and Technology (PIET), Jaipur, is a premier autonomous engineering institution established in 2007. Renowned for fostering academic excellence, innovation, and real-world skills, PIET offers a dynamic learning environment through modern infrastructure, research-led teaching, and hands-on project-based learning. The institute is:

• NAAC Accredited with an 'A' Grade
• NBA Accredited for its B.Tech Programs
• Approved by AICTE
• Affiliated to RTU, Kota (Autonomous)
• Certified by AISHE & ISO
• Recognized in NIRF Rankings

PIET’s autonomous status empowers it to build a flexible and future-ready academic model that nurtures engineers, entrepreneurs, and industry leaders of tomorrow.

fees.loan_assistance: Yes, loan assistance is available. PIET helps students apply for education loans through partnered nationalized and private banks. Required documentation and guidance are provided by the accounts and admission team.
fees.payment_options: Students can pay their fees through both online and offline modes. Online options include net banking, UPI, credit/debit card payments, while offline payments can be made via Demand Draft or cash directly at the campus office.
fees.any_hidden_charges: No hidden charges. All fees are transparently listed in the official fee structure and communicated during the admission process. Students are only expected to pay the documented amounts.
fees.about:
The total annual fee for B.Tech programs at PIET is ₹1,19,805. This includes:

• Tuition Fee: ₹85,575/year
• Development Fee: ₹12,835/year
• NAAC Accreditation Fee: ₹21,395/year
• Autonomous Institute Fee: ₹8,560/year

💼 Other One-Time or Recurring Charges:
• Registration Fee: ₹1,500 (One-time)
• RTU Development Fee: ₹2,500 (One-time)
• Uniform Fee: ₹4,000 (One-time)
• Activity Fee: ₹5,000 (Per annum)
• RTU Exam & Enrollment Fee: As per actual RTU norms

🎓 Scholarships and loan support are available for eligible students based on merit or financial need. PIET ensures a transparent and student-friendly fee structure to support academic success.

courses.btech branches: Poornima Institute offers various B.Tech programs focused on Computer Science and its emerging specializations. The available branches include: CSE (Core), CSE (Regional Language Computing), CSE (IoT – Internet of Things), CSE (Cybersecurity), CSE (AI & DS – Artificial Intelligence and Data Science), CSE (AI), and CSE (Data Science). These programs are designed to meet the demands of the tech industry and ensure students are future-ready.
courses.specializations:
Specializations offered under B.Tech CSE include:
- IoT
- Cybersecurity
- AI & DS (Artificial Intelligence and Data Science)
- Data Science
- Regional Language-based Computing
courses.new courses: Yes, Artificial Intelligence (AI) has been recently introduced as a dedicated course under B.Tech CSE.
courses.ai ml courses: No, AI/ML is not offered as a separate course, but related subjects are included within AI & Data Science specialization.
courses.curriculum: The B.Tech curriculum includes core subjects, electives, and mandatory industrial training (I3) along with compulsory internships, which greatly support placement preparation.
courses.value added courses: Yes, the college offers value-added and skill-based certificate courses to enhance technical and professional skills alongside the B.Tech curriculum.

courses_offered.bcom: No, PIET does not offer B.Com. However, Poornima University (PU), a part of the Poornima Group, offers this course. For more details, please contact PU at +91-7300369292.
courses_offered.bba: No, BBA is not offered at PIET. But Poornima University (PU), under the Poornima Group, offers BBA. Please contact PU at +91-7300369292 for more information.
courses_offered.mba: No, PIET does not offer MBA. However, Poornima University (PU), a part of the Poornima Group, offers this course. For more details, please contact PU at +91-7300369292.
courses_offered.mtech: No, PIET does not offer M.Tech. However, Poornima University (PU), a part of the Poornima Group, offers this course. For more details, please contact PU at +91-7300369292.

facilities.mess food: The college mess serves wholesome and hygienic vegetarian meals prepared with a focus on nutrition and quality. The menu is designed to offer a balanced diet that supports the health and well-being of students, with meals provided regularly in a clean and well-maintained dining environment.
facilities.wifi campus: High-speed Wi-Fi is available across the entire campus, including hostels, classrooms and common areas.
facilities.labs and equipment: Well-equipped labs for all engineering branches with modern tools and technologies.
facilities.classrooms: Smart classrooms with digital boards, projectors, and comfortable seating arrangements.
facilities.library: A large library with a vast collection of books, journals, and digital resources for students.
facilities.medical facilities: On-campus clinic with a qualified doctor and ambulance service for emergencies.
facilities.canteen: Affordable canteen providing hygienic food options for students.
facilities.gym:
Facilities for indoor and outdoor fitness with a modern gymnasium.
 Separate gyms for boys and girls, each equipped with a professional trainer for guided workouts.
facilities.about: Poornima Institute offers top-notch facilities including separate hostels for boys and girls with modern amenities, nutritious vegetarian mess food, and a large library stocked with books and digital resources. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled, including hostels and academic areas. Well-equipped labs and smart classrooms enhance learning experiences, while an on-campus medical clinic ensures health support. The campus also has a modern gymnasium, hygienic canteen, and transportation services for Jaipur-based students,For more details, contact dsw@poornima.org

campus.location: ISI - 2, Poornima Marg, Sitapura, Jaipur, Rajasthan 302022
campus.area: Spread across a large green campus in Sitapura Education Zone.
campus.facilities: Includes hostels, academic blocks, cafeteria, auditorium, gym, medical room, and sports ground.
campus.wifi: High-speed Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus including classrooms and hostels.
campus.security: PIET offers 24x7 security with CCTV monitoring and guard supervision.
campus.environment: Pollution-free, eco-friendly campus with modern infrastructure and peaceful study environment.
campus.visit: For a guided tour you can visit our campus from Monday to Saturday between 10 AM to 4 PM .
campus.about:
📍 *Campus Location:*
Poornima Institute is located at ISI - 2, Poornima Marg, Sitapura, Jaipur.


🏡 *Campus Area:*
Spacious and green campus environment.


🏢 *Facilities Available:*
Includes hostels, academic blocks, cafeteria, auditorium, gym, medical room, and sports ground.


🌐 *Internet Connectivity:*
High-speed Wi-Fi available across campus.


🔐 *Security:*
24x7 security surveillance with CCTV cameras.


🌿 *Environment:*
Eco-friendly and clean surroundings.


🕙 *Visiting Hours:*
You can visit the campus between 10 AM to 4 PM (Monday to Saturday).

annual_fest.about:
🎉 **Aarohan – The Grand Annual Fest of PIET** 🎉

PIET’s most awaited and grandest celebration — **Aarohan** — is held every year in **February or March**. This 4-day mega fest is one of the most popular college events across Jaipur! 🤩

✨ **Why Aarohan is Unmissable?**

🔹 4 days of non-stop excitement – from morning till midnight! 🌅🌙
🔹 Cultural events, competitions, fun games & delicious food stalls 🎭🎨🍕🎯
🔹 Electrifying DJ Nights that light up the campus 🎧🔥
🔹 **Celebrity Performances** by stars like:
   • 🎤 *Sunidhi Chauhan*
   • 🎶 *Sanam Band*
   • 🧢 *Seedhe Maut*
   • 🎙️ *Javed Ali* and many more!

🌟 *Aarohan isn't just a fest – it's an unforgettable experience for every PIETian!*

💥 Get ready for lights, music, and lifelong memories! 💃🕺

events.about:
💡 **Tech Events & Competitions at PIET** 💡

PIET regularly organizes exciting technical events to promote innovation and real-world skills:

• 🧠 **Manthan** – National-level debate competition
• 💻 **Hackathons** – 24-hour coding & innovation challenges
• 🤖 **Robo Fight** – Live robot battles built by students
• 👨‍💻 **Coding Competitions** – Test logic, speed & accuracy
• 🏅 **Kalanidhi** – Awards for academic toppers & achievers
• 🔧 **Project Expo** – Display of hardware & tech models

These events help students explore creativity, confidence, and teamwork beyond the classroom.

freshers_party.about:
**Freshers' Welcome at PIET** 

We believe in giving our newcomers a warm and grand welcome! 🤗

📌 The journey starts with a week-long orientation program called **Pehla Kadam**, full of interactions, guidance, and fun activities.

🎧 It ends with a **Grand Freshers' DJ Party**, where the entire campus comes alive with music, dance, and celebration.

Because every fresher at PIET deserves to feel special! 💫

farewell_party.about:
🎓 **Farewell Celebration at PIET** 🎓

To bid a joyful goodbye to our final-year students, PIET hosts a memorable **Farewell Party** with emotional performances, sharing memories, and a rocking **DJ Night**. 🎧💐

It’s our way of celebrating their journey and sending them off with smiles, dance, and heartfelt moments. 💖

student_life.clubs and societies: PIET hosts a wide range of student-led clubs including coding, robotics, literature, dance, drama, music, photography, and entrepreneurship. These clubs conduct events, fests, workshops, and competitions that allow students to explore their passions beyond academics.
student_life.technical_events: Regular tech events such as hackathons, coding contests, robotics showcases, and AI/ML workshops provide hands-on exposure to real-world problem solving and innovation.
student_life.cultural_activities: Cultural life at PIET thrives through events like fashion shows, dance battles, music nights, dramatics, and annual fests that celebrate diversity, talent, and creativity.
student_life.sports_activities: The institute encourages active participation in sports, with facilities for cricket, football, basketball, volleyball, badminton, and track & field. Annual sports meets and inter-college tournaments are also hosted.
student_life.student_council: An elected student council acts as a bridge between students and faculty. It organizes major campus events, supports club activities, and plays a key role in fostering leadership and responsibility.
student_life.mentorship_programs: Structured peer mentorship programs connect juniors with senior students who guide them through academics, campus life, and personal development.
student_life.about: Student life at PIET is dynamic and engaging, blending academics with creativity, leadership, and community. With vibrant clubs, impactful mentorship, cultural festivals, tech innovation, and sports spirit, PIET offers a holistic college experience that goes far beyond classrooms.

academics.about: 📘 Academics at PIET: PIET offers strong academics supported by experienced faculty, practical learning methods, and consistent results. Students benefit from outcome-based teaching, regular assessments, remedial support, and a structured class schedule.

placements.placement_record: PIET consistently records a placement rate close to 79% in core branches like Electrical, Civil, and Mechanical, with even higher rates in IT-related streams.
placements.top_recruiters: Top recruiters include Amazon, Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, L&T, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, ZS Associates, Deloitte, and Ericsson, among others.
placements.highest_package: The highest package offered has reached ₹45 LPA, with top offers coming from companies like Amazon.
placements.average_package: The average package stands at approximately ₹5.45 LPA, reflecting steady growth and industry demand.
placements.number_of_offers: More than 1,600 job offers are made during each placement cycle, with 350+ companies visiting the campus.
placements.placement_training: Dedicated placement training begins from the second year onwards, focusing on aptitude, interview prep, and technical skill-building. These sessions are led by internal faculty, industry trainers, and alumni working in top-tier firms. Mock tests and group discussions are conducted regularly to simulate real interview environments.
placements.internship_support: Students are supported with summer internships, industrial training, and semester-long live projects through collaborations with reputed companies. Many of these internships convert into pre-placement offers (PPOs), giving students early career assurance and industry exposure.
placements.training_modules: Training includes modules on soft skills, aptitude, competitive coding, resume building, mock interviews, and company-specific workshops. Sessions are tailored to match placement patterns of top recruiters, and students also receive guidance for off-campus and international opportunities.
placements.placement_cell: PIET’s full-time Training & Placement Cell works proactively with industry partners and students to ensure placement readiness and career success. The cell coordinates campus drives, maintains recruiter relations, tracks student progress, and offers one-on-one mentoring to maximize placement outcomes.
placements.about: B.Tech graduates from Poornima Institute of Engineering and Technology (PIET) benefit from a strong placement ecosystem, attracting top recruiters such as Amazon, Infosys, TCS, Deloitte, and Ericsson. The institute maintains a high placement rate, particularly in IT and core engineering branches, and also supports students pursuing higher education or launching startups.

pbic.purpose: To nurture entrepreneurial thinking and provide students with the resources and guidance to transform their startup ideas into scalable ventures.
pbic.services:
Key offerings include:
1. Mentorship by seasoned industry experts
2. Seed funding support for promising ideas
3. Co-working space within campus
4. Workshops, hackathons, and startup bootcamps
5. Investor meets and pitch sessions
pbic.eligibility: All PIET students with innovative, feasible ideas are encouraged to apply for incubation and startup support through PBIC.
pbic.success_stories: Several PBIC-incubated startups have received external funding, gained national recognition, and been featured in startup expos and competitions.
pbic.contact: For queries, write to pbic@poornima.org or visit the PBIC office located inside the PIET campus.
pbic.about: Poornima Business Incubation Center (PBIC) is the innovation and entrepreneurship hub of PIET. It empowers students to build startups from the ground up with dedicated mentorship, funding avenues, and collaborative workspaces, fostering a culture of innovation and self-reliance.

student_support.counseling_services: Professional counselors are available to support students facing academic stress, personal challenges, or emotional struggles, ensuring mental well-being throughout their college journey.
student_support.mentorship_programs: Structured mentorship programs connect juniors with experienced seniors to help them adjust smoothly to campus life, academics, and professional expectations.
student_support.career_guidance: Regular sessions on career planning, resume building, internships, and interview prep are conducted by industry experts and alumni to boost student readiness.
student_support.financial_aid: Merit-based scholarships and need-based fee concessions are offered to support talented students who may face financial barriers.
student_support.grievance_redressal: A formal grievance redressal system is in place, ensuring that student complaints or concerns are addressed quickly and fairly.
student_support.about: Poornima Institute offers well-rounded student support through academic counseling, mental wellness services, peer mentorship, career guidance, and financial assistance. A dedicated Student Welfare Department actively works to create a positive and inclusive campus experience.

clubs.council_structure:
👥 The Student Council is the organizing body that oversees club activities and student engagement. It includes:
• Faculty Advisor: Mr. Ashok Kumar
• Chairperson: One student from 3rd Year
• Two Co-Chairs: From 2nd Year
• Club Captains: One from 2nd Year for each club
• Vice-Captains: One from 1st Year for each club
clubs.literary: 📝 A hub for readers, writers, and debaters. Hosts open mics, writing contests, and literary fests.
clubs.aptineus: 🧠 The official aptitude & reasoning club that sharpens problem-solving skills for competitive exams.
clubs.udaan_aero_modelling: ✈️ Explores aerospace and model-building through hands-on drone and glider projects.
clubs.helping_hands: 🤝 A social welfare club focused on community service, volunteering, and charitable drives.
clubs.joshiley_dram_club: 🎭 The dramatic arts club—known for powerful stage plays, street performances, and acting workshops.
clubs.ebug: 💻 The core coding club that dives deep into development, debugging, and competitive programming.
clubs.perfect_pixels: 📸 A creative corner for photographers and visual storytellers, capturing campus life and events.
clubs.piet_sports_club: 🏆 Manages inter- and intra-college sports events, fitness initiatives, and team selections.
clubs.origin_club: 🌱 Focuses on eco-friendly initiatives, sustainability drives, and campus greenery projects.
clubs.cyborgs: 🤖 A robotics and automation club for students passionate about building bots and embedded systems.
clubs.aws: ☁️ For students interested in cloud computing, certified trainings, and real-time AWS projects.
clubs.ieee: ⚡ PIET's official IEEE student branch fostering innovation in electrical, electronics, and computer tech.
clubs.acm: 👨‍💻 A professional chapter that promotes computing research, coding culture, and academic excellence.
clubs.graduate_gateway: 🎓 Supports students aiming for higher studies abroad with resources on GRE, SOPs, and applications.
clubs.microsoft_learn_student_ambassador: 💼 Builds tech leadership through Microsoft’s global student program focused on community learning.
clubs.spic_macay: 🎶 Promotes Indian classical music and cultural heritage through performances and workshops.
clubs.vibrant_vision: 🎨 A club dedicated to design, art, and creativity across digital and traditional mediums.
clubs.about: ✨ PIET offers a diverse range of student clubs under the guidance of the Student Council. From tech and cultural to social impact and career-focused groups, each club provides students the opportunity to grow, lead, and contribute beyond the classroom.

help.admission helpline: 📞 For quick help regarding B.Tech admissions, feel free to call our Admission Helpline at: 099285 55222. Our counselors are available to assist you with course details, eligibility, fee structure, and more.
help.email: Have questions about admissions or academics? Email us anytime at: info@poornima.org — our team will get back to you promptly.
help.website: For any queriesregarding courses, faculty, or campus infrastructure. Visit our official website: https://www.poornima.org/ for comprehensive details and updates.
help.campus visit: Curious about campus life? You’re welcome to visit PIET from Monday to Saturday between 10 AM and 4 PM. Walk-ins are allowed, but prior booking is encouraged during admission season.
help.student support: For hostel-related questions, mess facilities, or any student life concerns, connect directly with the Dean of Student Welfare at: dsw@poornima.org.
help.placements office: For any queries for placement stats. Reach out to our Training and Placement Office at 0141-2770798 or email tpo@poornima.org.
help.social media:
Stay connected with us for campus highlights, event updates, and student achievements:
Instagram: https://instagram.com/poornimacolleges
Facebook: https://facebook.com/PoornimaGroupOfColleges
help.about:

• 📧 Email: info@poornima.org

🎓 Student Life, Hostel, or Mess Queries: dsw@poornima.org

Follow us for updates, student life insights, and more:
Instagram: https://instagram.com/poornimacolleges
Facebook: https://facebook.com/PoornimaGroupOfColleges

📌 Whether you're a prospective student or a curious parent, our team is here to guide you every step of the way.

recognition_and_affiliation.about: Poornima Institute of Engineering & Technology (PIET) is an autonomous, self-financed, non-government engineering college located in Jaipur. It is affiliated to Rajasthan Technical University (RTU),Kota and recognized under Section 2(f) of the UGC Act. The institute has also been accredited with an 'A' Grade by NAAC, reflecting its strong academic quality and institutional performance.

management_body.about:
PIET is managed by the Poornima Group of Colleges. It is guided by an advisory board comprising eminent educationists, industrialists, and former bureaucrats:
• Mr. Shashikant Singhi
• Dr. S. M. Seth
• Shri Vinod K. Ladia
• Shri Inderjeet Khanna
• Prof. Vijay Pal Singh
• Prof. Vishwanath Sinha
• Dr. S. S. Acharya
• Dr. Kanta Ahuja
• Padma Bhushan Shri D. R. Mehta

leadership.principal: Dr. Dinesh Goyal is the Principal of PIET, an expert in CSE with 24+ years of experience. He holds a PhD and leads initiatives in NEP 2020, research, and accreditations. Email: dinesh.goyal@poornima.org
leadership.registrar_ombudsperson: Dr. Balwan serves as Registrar and Ombudsperson. He has a PhD in Concrete Technology and strong experience in civil engineering education. Email: registrar.piet@poornima.org
leadership.controller_of_examination: Dr. Nitin Mukesh Mathur is the Controller of Examination. Contact: 9694729323
leadership.governing_council: The Governing Council includes experts from academia, industry, RTU, AICTE, and the government. It is chaired by Mr. Anupam Gupta (Celebal Technologies) with Dr. Dinesh Goyal and Dr. Gautam Singh as members.

departments.applied_sciences:
📘 Department of Applied Sciences at PIET:

• Established in 2007 to provide foundational education for first-year B.Tech students.
• Offers key subjects like Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, and Communication Skills.
• Comprises 34 dedicated faculty members focused on student-centric learning.
• Focuses on building analytical skills, scientific mindset, and technical thinking.
• Labs are fully equipped for hands-on learning in science and basic engineering.
• Encourages 'learning by doing' through student projects and experiments.
• Lays the academic groundwork for success in all core engineering branches.
departments.computer_science:
💻 Department of Computer Science and Engineering at PIET:

• Established in 2007, it is one of the largest departments with over 1000 students.
• Offers B.Tech in CSE with specializations in AI, Data Science, IoT, Cybersecurity, and more.
• Has a strong team of 35 faculty members including PhD holders and industry experts.
• Focuses on practical learning through labs, projects, and internships.
• State-of-the-art labs equipped with latest software and hardware technologies.
• Regular workshops, hackathons, and coding competitions to enhance skills.
• Strong placement record with top tech companies recruiting students annually.
departments.ai_ds:
📘 Department Overview:

• Launched in 2021–22, offering B.Tech in AI & DS with intake of ~480 students.
• Powered by a team of 22 faculty members with expertise in AI, ML, data science, and research.
• Curriculum integrates AI/ML, big data analytics, statistical methods, NLP, deep learning, computer vision.
• Chartered to develop ethical, research-driven professionals equipped for domains like healthcare, finance, agriculture.
• Faculty have published 100+ research papers and secured industry-funded projects.
• 100% placements in leading IT/AI firms, supported by industry visits, guest lectures, cloud partnership (AWS).
• State‑of‑the‑art labs (Business Intelligence, NLP, IoMT‑Healthcare) and TCSion‑ERP for transparent academics.
• Departments hosts ATAL FDPs, organizes ICRACS AI conference, and maintains active Board of Studies.
• HOD Dr. Budesh Kanwar emphasizes hands‑on learning, innovation, industry alignment, and research excellence.
departments.iot:
📘 Department Overview:

• Launched in 2023–24 with a B.Tech program in CSE‑IoT (60 seats, AICTE approved, RTU affiliated).
• Driven by a compact team of 5 faculty members experienced in both CS and electronics domains.
• Builds an innovation ecosystem at the intersection of CS & Electronics for IoT solutions improving everyday life.
• Hosts workshops/FDPs on PCB design, Arduino, CAD, 3D printing, prototyping and Industry 4.0 tools with strong participation.
• Promotes project exhibitions, research engagement and international R&D exposure through events like ICISRI.
• Prepares students for digital-age tech careers through hands-on learning, technical seminars and industry partnerships.
departments.cybersecurity:
📘 Department Overview:

• Established in 2023–24 with B.Tech in CSE-Cybersecurity (60 seats, AICTE approved, RTU affiliated).
• Focuses on protecting digital assets and networks from cyber threats through advanced security technologies.
• Faculty includes experts with industry experience and research credentials in cybersecurity.
• Equipped with state-of-the-art labs for ethical hacking, network security, and digital forensics.
• Offers hands-on training, workshops, and seminars on latest cybersecurity trends and tools.
• Collaborates with industry partners to provide real-world exposure and internship opportunities.
• Prepares students for careers in cybersecurity through practical learning and skill development.

innovation_research.aicte_idea_lab:
📘 AICTE IDEA Lab at PIET:

• A national-level innovation lab funded by AICTE to promote creativity, prototyping, and entrepreneurship.
• Equipped with 3D printers, CNC machines, PCB mills, laser cutters, smart boards, and more.
• Hosts hackathons, workshops, internships, and school outreach programs throughout the year.
• Led by Dr. Dinesh Goyal and supported by experienced faculty & technical mentors.
• PIET teams have won top ranks in national innovation contests and hackathons.
• Supports startups, IPR filing, and prototype-to-product journeys.
✅ *Unique Highlight:* PIET is the **only** engineering college in Jaipur with an officially funded **AICTE IDEA Lab** – a rare recognition of innovation excellence.

📷 View Lab Image: https://www.piet.poornima.org/PIET_NAAC_SSR/PIET_Gallery/IDEA_LAB/IMG_20230721_140603.jpg
innovation_research.funding_incubation:
📘 PIET’s funding & incubation initiatives:

• *AICTE IDEA Lab Bootcamp: ₹12.69 Lakh (April 2024) – innovation & entrepreneurship program funded by AICTE.
• **Smart India Hackathon Finale: ₹11.05 Lakh (Dec 2023) – MoE Innovation Cell sponsored major hackathon.
• **AU-Small Finance Bank Endowment: ₹7 Lakh to support research and incubation.
• **PBIC (Business Incubation Centre): Incubates ~35 startups since 2014, offering free co-working space, mentoring, IPR assistance, utilities & startup support. 📷 See PBIC space: https://www.piet.poornima.org/pbic.html
• **IPR Incentives: Full reimbursement for patent/copyright filing plus rewards up to ₹50,000 upon grant.
• **Industry Funding & Consultancy*: Over ₹21.7 Lakh received; 15+ papers published with industry; government- & industry-funded labs (MODROB, REDHAT, ORACLE).
innovation_research.research_development_cell:
📘 Overview:

• Promotes research culture among faculty, students & scholars at PIET.
• Encourages interdisciplinary collaboration, innovation, and industry-academia partnerships.
• Provides support for research proposals, publications, patents, and technology transfer.
• Champions emerging areas like AI, IoT, blockchain, renewable energy, biotech, robotics, smart infrastructure.
• Hosts workshops, FDPs, conferences & seminars to build research capacity and innovation mindset.
innovation_research.iic:
1. Established in 2018 under MoE’s IIC (AICTE).
2. Promotes innovation, startups, IPR, research & entrepreneurship.
3. Rated 3.5 stars in 2023–24.
4. Conducted 65+ activities like IPR sessions, UDHBHAV, etc.
5. Hosted Smart India Hackathon twice; won regional innovation award.
6. Team: 25 members, 5 mentors, 9 incubation, 5 pre-incubation, 10 IP units.
7. Key: Dr. Goyal, Dr. Mathur, Dr. Singh, Mr. Natani.
innovation_research.ipr:
1. Protects patents, copyrights & trademarks.
2. 100% reimbursement for filing.
3. Assists in patent drafting & IP filing.
4. Organizes workshops & training.
5. 140+ patents published, 10 granted.
6. Led by expert committee at PIET.
innovation_research.industry_institute_interaction_practices:
1. Purpose: To make students industry-ready.
2. Weekly I3 Day: 5–6 hour practical training sessions.
3. Topics: AWS, Python, ML, CAD, Solar, EVs.
4. Includes expert talks, workshops, visits, certifications.
5. 85%+ placement; highest package ₹12 LPA.
innovation_research.partners_industry_interaction:
📘 PIET collaborates with leading companies, startups, and research institutions to drive innovation, enrich learning, and boost student placements.

• Internship & Project Tie-ups: Industry partners like Upflair, Zeetron, Quantum Bit, and more offer live projects and internships aligned with RTU guidelines.
• Faculty-Industry Workshops & Conferences: Experts regularly conduct workshops and co-host conferences to bridge academic-industry gaps.
• Innovation & Incubation: Through PBIC, PIET has incubated 35+ startups and secured AICTE‑CII 'Platinum' rating and 3.5✭ from MoE’s IIC.
• Industry‑Funded Labs: Hosts labs like AICTE‑MODROB neural network/deep learning, REDHAT, ORACLE, and Rajasthan’s first IDEA Lab.
• Placements & Achievements: Over 80% placement with average package ₹5.6 LPA; partnerships with TCS, Infosys, Capgemini, Celebal, Byju’s, and more.
• Research & Funding: Secured ₹21.7 L industry funds, published 15+ industry co-authored papers, and facilitated 150+ company visits and events.
• Annual Reports & Policy: III‑Cell annual reports available (2018‑19 to 2023‑24); active III policy implemented since 2018.
• Academic Linkages & MoUs: Strengthened MoUs with companies like Coding Ninjas, City Innovates, Samatrix, and institutes like VIT, Bennett University for internships & research.
innovation_research.about:
🔬 *Innovation, Research & Entrepreneurship at PIET*:

PIET fosters innovation through its AICTE-funded IDEA Lab, which offers hands-on tech tools and hosts national hackathons. The campus incubator PBIC supports 35+ startups with funding, space, and mentorship. The Research & Development Cell promotes publications, patents, and interdisciplinary work. Through IIC (rated 3.5★), PIET runs 60+ activities yearly around IPR and startups. Weekly I3 Days provide industry-focused training, while strong industry tie-ups fuel internships, labs, placements, and collaborative research.

chapters.ISTE_Chapter: Promotes technical excellence and professional values through workshops, seminars, and national-level student conventions.
chapters.IEEE_Chapter: Encourages innovation and research in electrical and electronics engineering via technical events, paper presentations, and industry talks.
chapters.ACM_Chapter: Focuses on computing and software development through coding challenges, hackathons, and knowledge-sharing sessions.
chapters.IETE_Chapter: Supports students in electronics and telecommunication fields by organizing tech fests, expert lectures, and project showcases.
chapters.Poornima_Electoral_Literacy_Forum: Educates students about voting rights and democratic responsibilities through awareness drives and campus election simulations.

accreditation.about: PIET holds multiple prestigious accreditations and rankings: NAAC Grade A (renewed in 2025), NBA accreditation for B.Tech (CE & Civil), ISO certified, and registered under AISHE. It has a QS I‑Gauge Diamond rating, actively participates in NIRF, is ranked 4th in RTU’s QIV Index, and featured in Times Engineering Rankings for academic excellence.

alumni.about:
Poornima Institute Alumni Society (PIAS) – network of 3500+ alumni
Active Alumni Executive Committee—Shashi Kant Singhi (Chair), Dipti Lodha (Sec), etc.
Support students via events, mentoring & career guidance
Runs a dedicated alumni committee to stay connected
Organizes regular alumni interactions, webinars & campus involvement
Key Alumni: Prachi Sharma (HR Manager, RoboMQ Pvt Ltd), Nilesh Kumawat (Site Engineer, Anukampa Groups), Ankit Kumawat (Sr. Software Engineer, A3logics), Arushi Kataria (DevOps Engineer, Sourcefuse)

anti_ragging.about:
🚫 *Ragging is strictly prohibited at PIET.* Any student found guilty will face immediate and harsh action, including possible expulsion.

📌 *FIR must be filed* by the institution in every serious case. If a victim or parent lodges an FIR directly, the college must still file it.

📖 Students found involved in ragging (even in the past) may be refused admission or expelled.

📞 *Anti-Ragging Committee Contacts*:

poornima_group.about:
📚 Poornima Group of Colleges has 3 main institutions in Jaipur:

1️⃣ Poornima University (PU) – A private university offering B.Tech, Fashion Design, BCA, MCA, M.Tech & more. 📞 +91 88750 87118

2️⃣ Poornima College of Engineering (PCE) – RTU-affiliated college offering B.Tech in CS, Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, etc. 📞 +91 99289 87000

3️⃣ Poornima Institute of Engineering & Technology (PIET) – Focuses on Computer Science & specializations. Home to AICTE IDEA Lab – the only one in Jaipur. 📞 +91 99285 55222

Each campus has unique strengths, so choose based on your interest & course preference.I'm the official bot of Poornima Institute of Engineering and Technology (PIET) Ask me anything about the college – I'm here to assist you!

dress_code.about:
👔 Dress Code at PIET:

🔹 Uniform is compulsory on:
   • Monday
   • Tuesday

🔹 Casuals are allowed on:
   • Wednesday to Saturday

🔹 Students should wear decent and appropriate attire on casual days.

🔹 Uniform ensures discipline and professional culture on campus.

hostel_info.about:
🏠 Hostel Info at PIET:

🔹 Separate hostels for **boys and girls** with full security and 24×7 monitoring.

🔹 Hostel fee depends on room type and facilities — ranges from **₹1,00,000 to ₹1,50,000 per year**.

🔹 Rooms available with fan, cooler, or AC; single, double, and triple sharing options.

🎉 A **3-day fest named 'Ojas'** is specially organized every year for hostel students!

transport.personal commute: Yes, students and parents can visit using personal vehicles. Parking is available near the main entrance.
transport.about:
Poornima Institute provides a reliable and well-structured bus transportation service for both students and staff across various parts of Jaipur. The institute operates a fleet of regularly maintained buses, each manned by trained and experienced drivers who strictly follow all safety protocols.
 Buses run on predefined routes covering major areas of the city. The transport facility is also provided during examination days and other occassions.
 For more information contact:
*Transport Officer*: Mr. B.P. Yadav  
📧 Email: transport@poornima.org  
📞 Phone: +91-9829855509

refund_policy.about:
📄 *Refund Policy – PIET Admission Withdrawal*

✔️ *15+ days before* last date: 💯 100% refund (No deduction)
✔️ *<15 days before* last date: 90% refund (10% fee deducted)
✔️ *Within 15 days after* last date: 80% refund (20% fee deducted)
✔️ *16–30 days after* last date: 50% refund (50% fee deducted)
❌ *After 30 days*: No refund

📌 *Note*: 'Last date' refers to the officially announced final admission date.
